name: RABBIT-CAGE-5
title: Five obsolete feature directories remain on disk: root-management, policy-enforcement, subagent-policy-injection, breeder, vet
description: Five feature dirs should be deleted or archived but still exist on disk: (1) root-management — absorbed by rabbit-cage; (2) policy-enforcement — superseded by policy/ feature; (3) subagent-policy-injection — superseded by contract/scripts/policy-block.sh; (4) breeder — superseded by dispatch-feature-edit.sh; (5) vet — superseded by contract/scripts/rabbit-triage.sh. Three of these (breeder, vet, subagent-policy-injection) are already excluded from registry.json but still have feature.json on disk, causing registry/disk drift.
